HGSS.260.0000:
Oh, hello!
Right this way, please!\f
HGSS.260.0001:
Hello.
I’m glad to meet you.\f
My name is Teala, and I’m your guide
to the Pokémon Wi-Fi Club.\f
First, I need to give you this.\f
HGSS.260.0002:
That’s your Pal Pad. You may register
your friends in it.\f
Once registered, you may link with
those friends over Nintendo Wi-Fi\r
Connection to trade Pokémon, battle,\r
and so on.\f
Would you like to know more? [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0003:
You may meet people on the second
floor of a Pokémon Center for trades\r
or Colosseum battles.\f
You may register such people as
friends in your Pal Pad.\f
You may also manually register friends
by entering their Friend Codes into\r
your Pal Pad.\f
Would you like me to repeat that? [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0004:
I hope you enjoy using Nintendo
WFC!
HGSS.260.0005:
Welcome to the Pokémon Center Wi-Fi
Club!\f
May I help you with anything? [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0006:
Let me explain how the Pokémon Wi-Fi
Club is set up.\f
From the middle counter, you may use
Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection.\f
Over Nintendo WFC, you may conduct
trades and battles with friends\r
that you’ve registered in\r
your Pal Pad. [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0007:
Welcome to the Pokémon Wi-Fi Club!\f
Would you like to use Nintendo Wi-Fi
Connection? [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0009:
Would you like to launch
Nintendo WFC? [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0011:
...Oh?\f
I’m sorry, but you don’t have any
friends registered in your Pal Pad.\f
The Wi-Fi Club cannot be used if
no friends are in your Pal Pad.\f
Would you like to get your own
Friend Code at least? [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0012:
...Oh?\f
I’m sorry, but you don’t have any
friends registered in your Pal Pad.\f
The Wi-Fi Club cannot be used if
no friends are in your Pal Pad.\f
Please register friends in your
Pal Pad, and then come back.
HGSS.260.0013:
At any Wi-Fi Club, you may play using
Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection.\f
Doing so, you may trade or battle with
friends you have registered in your\r
Pal Pad.\f
Two kinds of battles can be conducted:
Single or Double.\f
For each kind, you may choose one of
three level restrictions: Free,\r
Level 50, or Level 100.\f
For Level 50 and Level 100, the levels
of all participating Pokémon will be\r
temporarily changed to the set level.\f
Connect to Nintendo WFC? [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0017:
Pardon us for the inconvenience...
Please return once you have stopped\r
being a member of Team Rocket...
HGSS.260.0018:
Hello, you may enter our Pokémon
Center Wi-Fi Plaza from here.\f
Would you like to use Nintendo
Wi-Fi Connection? [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0021: We look forward to your next visit.
HGSS.260.0022:
The Wi-Fi Plaza is a facility where you
may meet Trainers from around the\r
world.\f
You can take part in chats and play
Plaza Games.\f
You may also play with Tap Toys
that are exclusive to the Wi-Fi Plaza.\f
Please note there is a time limit to the
Wi-Fi Plaza connection.\f
You will be disconnected after a set
amount of time.\f
We hope you will get the most out of
each visit to the Wi-Fi Plaza!\f
Connect to Nintendo WFC? [0200,0000]
HGSS.260.0026:
Sorry, we’re getting things ready.
Please come back later.
HGSS.260.0027:
Pardon us for the inconvenience...
but people wearing black clothing,\r
people who engage in unlawful\r
activities, and people who are\r
members of Team Rocket\r
are barred from participating.
HGSS.260.0028:
Pardon us for the inconvenience.\f
We have received word from Professor
Elm in New Bark Town that a PICHU\f
with spiky ears cannot be allowed
to enter.\f
Please place it in your PC Box and
enter again.
HGSS.260.0029:
Pardon us for the inconvenience.\f
The Spiky-eared Pokémon you are
traveling with...\r
It’s a kind that doesn’t appear in the\r
Pokémon Center’s database, so we\r
unfortunately cannot allow it to pass.\f
Please place it in a PC Box and
come back.
